_notes: Hand-bootstrapped fixture (2026-05-21). Windows cover the four known bench-relevant regimes: warmup (phantom-bounce sensitivity), the 148.52 NEAR miss (Bucket C pose-amplitude), and the three FAR misses 458.08/463.52/584.92 (phantom-bounce rally pollution). sa_bounce_frames is the 4-miss set — partial denominator until snapshot_task_ball is run on Render shell to fill in full SA shot frames.
